components.in_only_western: channels appearing in IN search results but NOT in US AND NOT in GB results
components.total_in_channels: all unique channels appearing in IN search results

gap_score.interpretation: 1.0 = all IN-visible channels are invisible to US+GB (complete gap). 0.0 = all IN-visible channels also visible in US+GB (no gap).
gap_score.caveat: gap_score is only meaningful when IN returns sufficient channels (>=5). Low IN-channel queries are flagged as low-confidence.

uk_data_quality_flag.note: Queries where GB returns 0 results are flagged separately. They are NOT assigned gap_score=1.0.
uk_data_quality_flag.handling: Excluded from GB-specific metrics. gap_score still computed from IN vs US+GB.

english_audio_verification.method: videos.list with part=snippet on all unique video IDs
english_audio_verification.classification: confirmed_english if defaultAudioLanguage == 'en', unknown if null/missing, non_english otherwise
english_audio_verification.note: relevanceLanguage=en biases search toward English metadata but does not verify spoken language. This pass catches Hindi-spoken videos with English titles.

breakout_score.note: Computed in Stage 3. Not available in Stage 1.

V01b_english_audio_checked.detail: 621 videos checked via videos.list, 109 confirmed English audio

V02_gap_score_computed.detail: 29/30 queries have valid gap_score (1 had <5 IN channels, marked null)

V04_threshold_applied.detail: gap threshold >= 0.3, 16/30 queries classified as gaps (1 had insufficient IN data for reliable score)
